info.name: Datarithm Backend API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Datarithm real-time spreadsheet platform.

**Setup:**
1. Set `baseUrl` variable to `http://localhost:3000`
2. After login, copy `accessToken` into the `token` variable
3. Copy `refreshToken` into the `refreshToken` variable

request.description: Returns all conversations with latest message and unread count per user.
